name: Mom's Six Week Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Measure dry ingredients into a very large mixing bowl that has a lid.
2. Add eggs, oil, and milk. Blend well until combined.
3. Fill muffin cups about half full with the batter.
4. Bake at 400°F for 15-20 minutes.
OR: Store the mix in an airtight container for up to six weeks. To prepare:
1. Mix 3 cups of dry ingredients, 1 cup milk (sour or add 1 tbsp vinegar), and 1/4 cup oil.
2. Add 1 egg (omit yolk if desired) to the mixture.
3. Fill muffin cups with the prepared batter.
4. Bake at 400°F for 15-20 minutes.
